name: Yusuke Nisaka V2
description:
(Koi To Uso, Love and Lies) ❤️

Yes, this is already a revamp of the other bot, but this one has significantly more tokens (and is rewritten).

However, the intro scenarios stay the same, personally I used the second intro for my usage of this bot.

Even if this character doesn’t get much usage outside of my own chats, I wouldn’t regret making this.

As always, use a Proxy for best experience! Oh, and use a good proxy prompt, I’ve recently swapped over to a new one and it’s made roleplay much more fun.

Lastly, if you find yourself without an appropriately aged persona to use, just do what I do and add into the chat summary the following:

{{user}} is the same age as {{char}}.

OR

{{user}} is the same age as Yusuke.

Edit 1: Aged up appropriately to comply with publishing to public.

Edit 2: Added Lorebook w/ Context of Other Characters (Ririna, Takasaki, Nejima, etc..)

With that in mind, if SOMEBODY were to want a dedicated “char” bot of the Koi To Uso World uploaded, I wouldn’t mind but seriously what are the chances out that 😂
creator: Ceasless
